coach_notes: To build a strong healthcare career, focus on developing customer service and vital signs skills, as these are foundational for patient interactions and clinical roles. You can gain these through volunteer work at clinics, online courses, or entry-level positions like medical assistant. Your existing strengths in assisting patients and case management provide a solid base—keep building on them!

jobs.title: Care Associate - Memory Care- 3rd Shift
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your skills in assisting patients, communication, and professionalism align well with memory care. Experience with medical tasks and shadowing suggests you can handle the role.
jobs.gaps: No specific memory care experience mentioned; 3rd shift may require stamina adjustment.

jobs.title: Caregiver - Entry Level - HHA Training Available
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong match with assisting patients, communication, and medical skills. Entry-level with HHA training available reduces experience gap.
jobs.gaps: No formal HHA certification yet; training may be needed.

jobs.title: Medical Assistant/Scribe
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your medical assisting, PCR, and patient care skills are directly relevant. Communication and planning support the scribe duties.
jobs.gaps: No formal scribe or medical terminology training listed; may need to learn EHR systems.

jobs.title: Personal Fitness Trainer
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Communication and planning skills could help with client interaction and session design.
jobs.gaps: No fitness training, exercise science, or personal training certification; lacks relevant experience.

jobs.title: APRN Student
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your medical background and education could provide a foundation for advanced practice nursing.
jobs.gaps: No APRN student status or graduate-level nursing education; requires significant academic advancement.
